Popcorn-Estuary by phil65. (Kodi's default skin) Popcorn-Estuary by phil65 and Piers. (Kodi's default skin) Popcorn-Estuary by phil65 and Piers. (Kodi's default skin)summary> Habillage Popcorn-Estuary par phil65 et Piers (habillage par défaut de Kodi). Popcorn-Estuary, un habillage par phil65 et Piers (habillage d'origine de Kodi) Popcorn-Estuary is the default skin for Kodi 17.0 and above. It attempts to be easy for first time Kodi users to understand and use. Popcorn-Estuary is the default skin for Kodi 17.0 and above. It attempts to be easy for first time Kodi users to understand and use. Popcorn-Estuary is the default skin for Kodi 17.0 and above. It attempts to be easy for first time Kodi users to understand and use. Popcorn-Estuary est l’habillage par défaut pour Kodi 17.0 et ultérieure. Il s’efforce d’être facile à comprendre et à utiliser pour les utilisateurs débutants de Kodi. Popcorn-Estuary est l'habillage d'origine pour Kodi 17.0 et supérieur. Il est facile à comprendre et à utiliser pour les utilisateurs novices de Kodi. Popcorn-Estuary-Estuary is the default skin for Kodi, removing it may cause issues Popcorn-Estuary is the default skin for Kodi, removing it may cause issues Popcorn-Estuary is the default skin for Kodi, removing it may cause issues Popcorn-Estuary est l’habillage par défaut de Kodi, le supprimer peut créer des problèmes Popcorn-Estuary est l'habillage d'origine de Kodi, le retirer peut créer des problèmes
